steps.title: Close the inserted phrase
steps.content: The comma after "become" opens an interrupting phrase: "with the breakout success of her 2020 novel Mexican Gothic." The blank must close that phrase before the main sentence continues with "best known as a novelist."

steps.title: Match the opening comma
steps.content: A uses a dash, which does not match the opening comma. B uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause. C leaves the interruption unclosed. A closing comma completes the sentence correctly. The answer is D.
